extraction_notes: PDF is bilingual: Kannada pages 1-38, English pages 41-71. Pages 39-40 and 72-73 are budget summary tables.
Source text extracted via Tesseract OCR (kan+eng) at 300 DPI; pdfplumber yielded (cid:NNNN) tokens for Kannada, PyMuPDF yielded a mix of Unicode + font-remapped glyphs. OCR gives clean text.

Speech is structured as 111 numbered items organised under 14 section headings (Administration, Finance & Accounts, Advertisement, Revenue, Land Acquisition, Public Relations, Urban Planning, Public Works, Lakes Division, Education, Forestry, Horticulture, Health, Sanitation, Animal Husbandry, Welfare).
Amounts quoted in crore (1 crore = 100 lakh) are converted to lakhs here for consistency with the rest of this codebase.

Some items are revenue targets (property tax, advertisement, Premium FAR, B->A Khata conversion) rather than expenditures; they are captured and tagged with category 'revenue' in the notes where relevant.

Items without a specific named scheme or quoted amount have been omitted per spec (e.g. general 'improve parks' statements). All 111 speech items were reviewed; only those with concrete named initiatives or specific quoted amounts are included.
Page numbers below refer to English-section pages (41-71). Kannada-section page numbers for the same items run roughly pages 8-37.

projects.name: Establishment of Ward Offices for 72 new wards
projects.description: Establish a ward office in each of the 72 newly constituted wards to decentralise administration and deliver Corporation functions at the ward level.
projects.verbatim_quote: 72 new wards have been constituted within the jurisdiction... Steps will be taken to establish Ward Offices in each ward to ensure that the Corporation's functions are carried out effectively at the ward level.

projects.name: e-Office paperless file management system
projects.description: Introduce paperless administration across all BSCC offices via the e-Office system to ensure transparency in file disposal.
projects.verbatim_quote: necessary measures will be undertaken to manage files through the e-Office system.

projects.name: Staff technical and professional training programme
projects.description: Training programmes for officers and staff in technical and professional competencies to enhance efficiency.
projects.verbatim_quote: measures will be taken to enhance the efficiency of the Corporation's officers and staff by providing training in technical and professional competencies.

projects.name: University research internship programme
projects.description: Internship opportunities for research scholars from universities and reputed colleges, linking academic research with administration.
projects.verbatim_quote: Opportunities will be provided for internship to research scholars from various universities and reputed colleges in the Corporation.

projects.name: BSCC own headquarters building at Banashankari Temple
projects.description: Construct BSCC's own corporation headquarters building in front of the Banashankari Temple; work to commence in 2026-27.
projects.verbatim_quote: An action plan has been prepared to construct the Bengaluru South City Corporation's own building in front of the Banashankari Temple at an estimated cost of Rs.150.00 crore, and the work will be commenced during the year 2026-27.

projects.name: Staff attendance management software
projects.description: Develop and implement new software to maintain and manage attendance of staff/employees across BSCC offices.
projects.verbatim_quote: New software will be developed and implemented to maintain and manage the attendance of staff/employees in the offices.

projects.name: Regularisation of direct-wage Pourakarmikas
projects.description: Regularise 1,929 direct wage Pourakarmikas by appointing them as permanent Pourakarmikas. (Kannada speech quotes 2,109.)
projects.verbatim_quote: Action has been initiated to regularize 1,929 direct wage Pourakarmikas by appointing them as permanent Pourakarmikas.

projects.name: Special vigilance squad for tax evasion and encroachments
projects.description: Multi-department (Revenue, Engineering, Health) vigilance squad to detect tax evasion, undertake tax revisions, monitor illegal buildings, and carry out encroachment eviction.
projects.verbatim_quote: A special vigilance squad consisting of officials from the Revenue, Engineering, and Health departments will be formed to detect Tax evasions and to undertake Tax revisions, monitor illegal buildings within the corporation limits and to carry out activities such as eviction of encroachments.

projects.name: High-level expert committee (urban planning, environment, SWM, IT)
projects.description: Constitute a high-level expert committee with domain experts in urban planning, environment, solid waste management, information technology and other sectors.
projects.verbatim_quote: Steps will be taken to constitute a high-level expert committee comprising experts from various fields within the Corporation jurisdiction.

projects.name: IFMS technology upgrade for financial management
projects.description: Study and adopt new technologies for more effective financial accounting and management on top of the existing Integrated Financial Management System (IFMS).
projects.verbatim_quote: All expenditures within the Corporation limits are already being managed through the Integrated Financial Management System (IFMS). Further, studies will be undertaken to adopt new technologies for more effective financial accounting and management.

projects.name: Internal Audit Department strengthening
projects.description: Strengthen the Internal Audit Department to ensure proper accounting across BSCC offices.
projects.verbatim_quote: The Internal Audit Department will be strengthened to ensure proper accounting in the offices under the jurisdiction of the Bengaluru South City Corporation.

projects.name: State Government revenue grant
projects.description: Revenue grant expected to be released to BSCC by the State Government of Karnataka.
projects.verbatim_quote: It is expected that a revenue grant of Rs.103.97 crores will be released to the Bengaluru South City Corporation by the State Government.

projects.name: 16th Central Finance Commission grant
projects.description: Grant expected under the 16th Central Finance Commission for infrastructure development.
projects.verbatim_quote: It is expected that a grant of Rs.128.29 crores will be released to the Bengaluru South City Corporation under the 16th Central Finance Commission grant.

projects.name: New advertisement policy (billboards, digital monitoring)
projects.description: Well-structured new advertisement policy identifying major corridors and roads; tendering for billboards with digital monitoring; expected revenue Rs.126 crore in 2026-27.
projects.verbatim_quote: Major corridors and roads within the jurisdiction will be identified, and the tender process will be undertaken to maximize revenue for the Bengaluru South City Corporation through advertisement billboards... an estimated revenue of Rs.126.00 crore is expected during the year 2026-27.

projects.name: Commercial advertisements on new skywalks
projects.description: Enhance revenue by permitting commercial advertisements on newly constructed skywalks.
projects.verbatim_quote: Measures will be taken to enhance the Corporation's revenue by permitting commercial advertisements on newly constructed skywalks.

projects.name: Property tax collection (scientific methods, no rate hike)
projects.description: Scientific methods of property tax collection without increasing the rate; expected property tax revenue for 2026-27.
projects.verbatim_quote: An estimated revenue of Rs.1,101.30 crore is expected from property tax during the year 2026-27.

projects.name: Tax-evasion identification and reassessment drive
projects.description: Identify tax-evasion cases and undertake re-assessment of legally-due taxes to improve tax administration efficiency.
projects.verbatim_quote: Steps will be taken to identify tax evasion cases and to undertake re-assessment of taxes legally due and thereby improve the efficiency on Tax Administration.

projects.name: B-Khata to A-Khata property conversion
projects.description: Ongoing conversion of B-Khata properties into A-Khata; expected revenue Rs.225 crore in 2026-27.
projects.verbatim_quote: The process of converting 'B Khata' properties into 'A Khata' properties within the jurisdiction is underway, and an estimated revenue of Rs.225.00 crore is expected during the year 2026-27.

projects.name: e-Khata property digitisation drive (5.13 lakh properties)
projects.description: Digitise all 5.13 lakh properties; 1.83 lakh e-Khatas already issued; balance to be issued by conducting camps in residential areas.
projects.verbatim_quote: Out of the 5.13 lakhs total properties 1.83 lakh number of E khathas have already been issued and balance will be issued soon by conducting camps within cluster residential areas.

projects.name: AI-enabled revenue / resource-mobilisation platform
projects.description: Special platform using Information Technology and AI to formulate resource-mobilisation and revenue-generation plans.
projects.verbatim_quote: Steps will be taken to create a special platform using Information Technology and AI technology to formulate plans for resource mobilization and revenue generation.

projects.name: Smart roadside parking system in commercial areas
projects.description: New smart parking system for commercial areas; expected to generate Rs.40 crore annual revenue.
projects.verbatim_quote: A new smart parking system will be implemented to systematically manage roadside parking in commercial areas... This is expected to generate a revenue of Rs. 40.00 crore annually.

projects.name: Land acquisition and TDR for road widening / junctions
projects.description: Land acquisition for widening of major roads, grade separators and junction development, funded via Transferable Development Rights (TDR).
projects.verbatim_quote: An amount of Rs.50.45 crores has been earmarked for land acquisition and related development works during the year 2026-27.

projects.name: Bannerghatta Road development (Dairy Circle to NICE Road)
projects.description: Development of Bannerghatta Road from Dairy Circle to NICE Road, as part of major traffic corridor improvements in South Bengaluru.
projects.verbatim_quote: Development of Bannerghatta Road, from Dairy Circle to NICE Road, is proposed to be undertaken during 2026-27.

projects.name: Subramanyapura Road widening (Banashankari Temple to ORR)
projects.description: Road widening works on Subramanyapura Road from Banashankari Temple to Outer Ring Road.
projects.verbatim_quote: road widening works on Subramanyapura Road (from Banashankari Temple to Outer Ring Road) at a cost of Rs.20.00 crores.

projects.name: Begur Main Road to Begur Koppa Road widening
projects.description: Road widening works from Begur Main Road to Begur Koppa Road. (Kannada speech uses 840.00; English uses 40.00. 40.00 crore treated as authoritative since English section explicitly matches context.)
projects.verbatim_quote: from Begur Main Road to Begur Koppa Road at a cost of Rs.40.00 crores are proposed to be undertaken.

projects.name: Ejipura Elevated Corridor (completion)
projects.description: Expedite ongoing Ejipura Elevated Corridor project; target completion end of September 2026.
projects.verbatim_quote: Efforts will also be made to expedite the ongoing Ejipura Elevated Corridor project and complete it by the end of September 2026.

projects.name: Land acquisition dispute fast-track resolution plan
projects.description: Special action plan for early disposal of pending land-acquisition cases.
projects.verbatim_quote: A special action plan will be undertaken for the early disposal of cases, related to land acquisition.

projects.name: BSCC dedicated website
projects.description: Develop a dedicated website for the Bengaluru South City Corporation focused on administrative transparency.
projects.verbatim_quote: A dedicated website will be developed for the Bengaluru South City Corporation. Focus will be on bringing transparency in Administration.

projects.name: Social media citizen outreach (Facebook, Instagram, YouTube)
projects.description: Effective use of Facebook, Instagram and YouTube to disseminate daily activity information to the public.
projects.verbatim_quote: Social media platforms such as Facebook, Instagram, and YouTube will be effectively utilized to disseminate information to the public regarding the day-to-day activities of the South City Corporation.

projects.name: Aayuktara Nade - Janara Kade (Commissioner's walk to people)
projects.description: Walk-through citizen interactions at various locations within the Corporation to address public grievances; to be continued.
projects.verbatim_quote: Under the unique programme "ಆಯುಕ್ತರ ನಡೆ - ಜನರ ಕಡೆ" walk-through interactions with citizens have already been conducted at various locations... This programme will be continued.

projects.name: Monthly citizen-representative review meetings
projects.description: Monthly review meetings with citizens' representatives (continuation of the Commissioner's walk programme) to ensure responsive administration.
projects.verbatim_quote: a review meeting will be held once every month with citizens' representatives to ensure that the administrative machinery has responded effectively to public grievances.

projects.name: Greater Bengaluru Comprehensive Master Plan contribution
projects.description: BSCC contribution to the Greater Bengaluru Comprehensive Master Plan being tendered by the Greater Bengaluru Authority.
projects.verbatim_quote: An amount of Rs.5.00 crore has been earmarked by the Bengaluru South City Corporation for the preparation of this Master Plan.

projects.name: Building plan approvals and occupancy certificates (fee revenue)
projects.description: Expected revenue from building plan approvals, sanctions, occupancy certificate fees via the Urban Planning Division.
projects.verbatim_quote: An estimated revenue of Rs.382.00 crore is expected from the fees collected for building plan approvals and issuance of occupancy certificates etc.

projects.name: Premium FAR policy (revenue via BSMILE)
projects.description: Revenue from newly introduced Premium FAR policy; funds to be utilised via BSMILE for city development projects.
projects.verbatim_quote: Under the newly introduced Premium FAR policy within the jurisdiction of the Bengaluru South City Corporation, an estimated revenue of Rs.360.00 crore is expected during the year 2026-27. It is proposed to utilize these funds for the development projects of Bengaluru city through BSMILE.

projects.name: Single Plot Approval system
projects.description: Revenue from newly implemented Single Plot Approval system within the Corporation's jurisdiction.
projects.verbatim_quote: An estimated revenue of Rs.175.00 crore is expected from the newly implemented Single Plot Approval system within the Corporation's jurisdiction.

projects.name: Scientific asphalt paving & pedestrian-friendly footpaths programme
projects.description: City-wide scientific asphalt paving, standardised pedestrian-friendly footpaths, integrated drainage and junction improvements to make roads pedestrian-, cyclist- and age-friendly.
projects.verbatim_quote: committed to present safe roads to citizens by adopting scientific asphalt paving, standardized and pedestrian-friendly footpaths, integrated drainage systems, and junction improvements.

projects.name: CMIDP & SIP arterial/sub-arterial/ward road upgradation
projects.description: Ongoing large-scale upgradation of arterial, sub-arterial and ward roads under CMIDP and SIP grants: asphalting, footpaths, drainage, junctions.
projects.verbatim_quote: Large-scale upgradation of arterial and sub-arterial roads and ward roads are in progress at a cost of Rs.433 crore, under CMIDP and SIP grants.

projects.name: Road Information Management System (RIMS)
projects.description: System to scientifically map all roads/footpaths and consolidate data; to aid future planning and transparency.
projects.verbatim_quote: Development of a Road Information Management System will be undertaken to scientifically map all the road network, collect and consolidate data on all roads and footpaths.

projects.name: Ward infrastructure development grant (Rs.2.25 cr per ward x 72)
projects.description: Allocation of Rs.2.25 crore per ward for capital works, emergency repairs and necessary infrastructure across all 72 wards.
projects.verbatim_quote: we propose to allocate Rs.2.25 crores to each ward. Accordingly, a total amount of Rs.162.00 crores has been earmarked for the development and maintenance of the 72 wards.

projects.name: Bus-stop passenger shelters and information boards
projects.description: Construction of bus stops with passenger shelters and information boards.
projects.verbatim_quote: Construction of bus stops, installation of necessary passenger shelters and information boards are proposed to be taken up.

projects.name: PPP automated multi-level car parking at major metro stations
projects.description: In partnership with BMRCL, explore PPP-model automated multi-level car parking at major metro stations to reduce traffic congestion.
projects.verbatim_quote: the City Corporation will closely work with the Bangalore Metro Rail Corporation Limited to explore the possibility of automated multi-level car parking facilities at major metro stations through the PPP (Public-Private Partnership) model.

projects.name: Citizen-friendly private-partnership parking policy
projects.description: New citizen-friendly policy and private participation at important locations to address long-term city traffic problems.
projects.verbatim_quote: Private Participation will be encouraged in providing parking facilities at important locations. A new Citizen friendly policy will be evolved to find a long-time solution to the traffic problem of the City.

projects.name: Banashankari Temple - Metro - TTMC pedestrian skywalk
projects.description: Barrier-free elevated pedestrian skywalk between Banashankari Temple, Metro Station and TTMC, in coordination with BMRCL.
projects.verbatim_quote: a barrier-free elevated pedestrian skywalk is proposed to be developed at a cost of Rs.32.00 crores in coordination with the Bangalore Metro Rail Corporation Limited.

projects.name: 18 pedestrian skywalks under PPP
projects.description: Construct 18 pedestrian skywalks under PPP model, per traffic-police recommendations, to improve pedestrian safety.
projects.verbatim_quote: the Corporation proposes to develop 18 pedestrian skywalks under the PPP (Public-Private Partnership) model to improve pedestrian safety.

projects.name: World Bank-funded stormwater drain development (28.50 km)
projects.description: Major stormwater drains totalling 28.50 km currently in progress under World Bank assistance; to be completed in 2026-27.
projects.verbatim_quote: With the assistance of the World Bank, development works of major stormwater drains measuring 28.50 km in length are currently in progress... at an estimated cost of Rs.440.00 crores.

projects.name: Disaster management plan (flood/waterlog preparedness)
projects.description: Emergency preparedness, equipment procurement and rapid response mechanisms for flooding and waterlogging during rains.
projects.verbatim_quote: An amount of Rs.5.00 crores has been earmarked for emergency preparedness, procurement of equipment, and establishing rapid response mechanisms.

projects.name: City beautification: fountains & decorative lighting
projects.description: Beautification of open spaces and construction of fountains at major circles/junctions with decorative lighting.
projects.verbatim_quote: Beautification of open spaces, Fountains at junction points are being proposed. A comprehensive plan will be prepared to take up such developments.

projects.name: Comprehensive development of BDA-handed-over layouts
projects.description: Parks, roads and streetlight maintenance for layouts handed over from Bangalore Development Authority.
projects.verbatim_quote: A special action plan will be prepared for the comprehensive development of layouts handed over by the Bangalore Development Authority, including development of parks, improvement of roads, and maintenance of streetlights.

projects.name: Streetlight LED conversion
projects.description: Convert existing streetlights to LED under energy conservation initiatives to reduce electricity cost and carbon emissions.
projects.verbatim_quote: action will be taken under energy conservation initiatives to convert streetlights within the jurisdiction of the Bengaluru South City Corporation into LED lights.

projects.name: Non-motorised transport (NMT) corridors
projects.description: Environment-friendly mobility corridors along major roads with developed footpaths, cycling lanes and safe pedestrian crossings.
projects.verbatim_quote: to develop environment-friendly mobility corridors by creating non-motorized transport corridors along major roads with well-developed footpaths, cycling lanes, and safe pedestrian crossings.

projects.name: Rs.200 crore Municipal Bond issuance
projects.description: BSCC intends to raise Rs.200 crore through bonds; funds to be utilised for infrastructure, asset creation and resource-generating projects.
projects.verbatim_quote: The Bengaluru South City Corporation intends to raise Rs.200.00 crores through Bonds, and a special plan will be prepared to utilize this fund for infrastructure development, asset creation, and resource-generating projects.

projects.name: Grade separator feasibility studies (Jayanagar, Vega City junctions)
projects.description: Feasibility studies for grade separators at Jayanagar Raghavendra Swamy Temple Junction, Vega City Junction and other major junctions.
projects.verbatim_quote: feasibility studies will be prepared for the construction of grade separators at Jayanagar Raghavendra Swamy Temple Junction, Vega City Junction, and other major junctions.

projects.name: 3-year junction beautification & skywalks programme
projects.description: Junction beautification, upgrading pedestrian pathways and construction of skywalks over the next three years.
projects.verbatim_quote: An amount of 50.00 crores is proposed to be earmarked in the 2026-27 budget to take up works during the next three years for junction beautification, upgrading pedestrian pathways, and construction of skywalks.

projects.name: RMP-2015 CDP road widening
projects.description: Road widening on major CDP roads identified in RMP-2015.
projects.verbatim_quote: Among the CDP roads identified in RMP-2015, road widening works will be undertaken on major roads. For this purpose, Rs.50.00 crore is proposed to be allocated.

projects.name: Public Space Improvement scheme (40 locations)
projects.description: Phased improvement of 40 identified public spaces under CSR or PPP models, with citizen-group consultation.
projects.verbatim_quote: Under Public Space Improvement scheme, 40 locations within the limits have already been identified in consultation with citizen groups. These Public Space improvements will be taken up in phases under CSR or PPP models.

projects.name: Phased development of remaining 6 lakes (of 59)
projects.description: Develop the 6 undeveloped lakes (of 59 total living lakes; 43 developed, 9 partial) in a phased manner.
projects.verbatim_quote: Of these, 43 lakes have been fully developed, 9 lakes have been partially developed, and 6 lakes remain to be developed. Action will be taken to develop the remaining lakes in a phased manner.

projects.name: Lake encroachment clearance and fencing
projects.description: Survey, clear encroachments and fence BSCC lakes to ensure protection.
projects.verbatim_quote: Action has been taken to protect all our Lakes; Majority of the Lakes have already been surveyed. Encroachments are being cleared... It is proposed to fence encroachment free lakes.

projects.name: BWSSB treated-water channel to developed lakes
projects.description: Channel treated sewage water from Sarakki Lake STP to Ganapati Pura, Kothanur, Chunchaghatta, Somasundarapalya, Mangammanapalya, Chikkabegur, Gottigere and Doddakammannahalli lakes.
projects.verbatim_quote: Pipeline works have already been undertaken to channel treated water from the sewage treatment plant established at Sarakki Lake by the Bangalore Water Supply and Sewerage Board (BWSSB) to fill up the developed lakes such as Ganapati Pura, Kothanur, and Chunchaghatta lakes.

projects.name: Apartment treated-water piping to surrounding lakes
projects.description: Use treated excess water from residential apartment complexes to top up surrounding lakes per KSPCB standards.
projects.verbatim_quote: It is proposed to utilise the treated excess water from the residential Apartment Complexes to fill up surrounding lakes in accordance with the standards prescribed by the Karnataka State Pollution Control Board (KSPCB).

projects.name: Begur & Madiwala Lake boating (tourism)
projects.description: Pilot PPP-model boating facility at Begur and Madiwala Lakes for tourism.
projects.verbatim_quote: Begur and Madiwala Lakes will be developed from Tourism Perspective. It is proposed to introduce Boating Facilities in these two lakes on a pilot basis on PPP model.

projects.name: Lake Mitra (Kere Mitra) community initiative
projects.description: Citizen-led initiative with walkers, residents and public to create a high-quality ecological environment in lakes.
projects.verbatim_quote: A new initiative titled "Lake Mitra" will be introduced to create a high-quality ecological environment in lakes, with the cooperation of walkers, residents and the general public.

projects.name: Open well recharge and restoration
projects.description: Comprehensive plan to recharge and restore open wells and use them to water surrounding parks and greenery.
projects.verbatim_quote: A Comprehensive action plan will be designed to recharge and restore the open wells within the Bengaluru South City Corporation limits and utilize them for watering surrounding parks, greenery and vegetation.

projects.name: Free uniforms, books, shoes, bags for BSCC school/college students
projects.description: Free school uniforms, notebooks, textbooks, shoes, socks and school bags for ~690 students in 5 nursery schools, 1 high school and 1 PU college run by BSCC.
projects.verbatim_quote: Students studying in these institutions will be provided free school uniforms, notebooks, textbooks, shoes, socks, and school bags. An amount of Rs.2.00 crore has been earmarked in the 2026-27 Budget for this purpose.

projects.name: School/college purified drinking-water units
projects.description: Install purified drinking-water units in BSCC schools and colleges.
projects.verbatim_quote: Action will be taken to provide purified drinking water units in schools and colleges under the Bengaluru South City Corporation.

projects.name: Phased renovation of old school/college buildings
projects.description: Phased renovation of old school and college buildings within BSCC.
projects.verbatim_quote: Action will be undertaken to renovate old buildings of schools and colleges within the Corporation's jurisdiction.

projects.name: NGO-supported quality education programme
projects.description: Quality education in BSCC schools and colleges with the support of citizens and NGOs.
projects.verbatim_quote: Efforts will be made to provide quality education in the Corporation's schools and colleges with the support of citizens and NGOs.

projects.name: School-zone parking & drop-off regulation
projects.description: Regulate parking and drop-off/pick-up in school zones with Traffic Police assistance.
projects.verbatim_quote: Steps will be taken to regulate parking, as well as drop-off and pick-up arrangements in school zones, with the assistance of the Traffic Police.

projects.name: Digital learning - Smart boards in BSCC schools/colleges
projects.description: Install smart boards in classrooms as part of the digital learning initiative.
projects.verbatim_quote: Digital learning will be promoted in schools and colleges under the Bengaluru South City Corporation. As part of this initiative, smart boards will be installed in classrooms.

projects.name: 25,000 saplings plantation (with BMRCL & K-RIDE)
projects.description: Plant and maintain 25,000 saplings of different species in collaboration with BMRCL and K-RIDE during 2026-27 (up from 12,000 in 2025-26).
projects.verbatim_quote: During 2026-27, it is proposed to plant and maintain 25,000 saplings of different species in collaboration with the Bangalore Metro Rail Corporation Limited and K-RIDE.

projects.name: Hazardous tree-branch reporting software app
projects.description: Pre-monsoon identification/removal of dry and hazardous tree branches, plus a public software app for reporting hazardous trees.
projects.verbatim_quote: a software application will be developed for the public to report hazardous trees, and a mechanism will be put in place for their timely removal.

projects.name: Wildlife rescue & relocation programme
projects.description: Rescue and relocate snakes, injured birds, reptiles, monkeys to prevent human-animal conflicts.
projects.verbatim_quote: Action to rescue injured birds, animals, reptiles and wildlife etc with the help of Wildlife rescuers will be undertaken... and release them into appropriate habitats or rehabilitation centres.

projects.name: Smruti Van (Memorial Forest) of medicinal trees
projects.description: Establish a special Smruti Van memorial forest prioritising medicinal-value trees.
projects.verbatim_quote: It is proposed to establish a special "Smruti Van" (Memorial Forest) by giving priority to trees with medicinal value within the Corporation limits.

projects.name: World Environment Day and forestry awareness programmes
projects.description: Programmes such as World Environment Day celebrations and awareness events to build concern for environment/forests among public, students and organisations.
projects.verbatim_quote: Programs such as the celebration of World Environment Day and other environmental awareness events will be organized.

projects.name: Bamboo & biodiversity plantation along lake boundaries
projects.description: Plant 25,000 bamboo saplings along lake boundaries and 40,000 biodiversity saplings under the compensatory plantation and maintenance grant.
projects.verbatim_quote: Action will be taken to plant 25,000 bamboo saplings of different species along the boundary areas of lakes... Additionally, under the compensatory plantation and maintenance grant, 40,000 biodiversity saplings will be planted and maintained.

projects.name: Development of 88 BDA-transferred parks
projects.description: Develop and beautify 88 parks (3.52 lakh sq m) recently handed over by the Bangalore Development Authority.
projects.verbatim_quote: Recently, 88 parks covering approximately 3.52 lakh square meters have been handed over by the Bangalore Development Authority. It is proposed to develop these parks.

projects.name: Brand Bengaluru / Green Bengaluru - 8 new parks
projects.description: 8 new parks under Brand Bengaluru / Green Bengaluru for which tenders and work orders have already been issued in 2025-26.
projects.verbatim_quote: Under the "Brand Bengaluru" and "Green Bengaluru," new parks are being created. During the year 2025-26, tenders have been invited and work orders issued for the development of 8 parks within the limits.

projects.name: Sponge parks for urban flood mitigation
projects.description: Develop Sponge Parks within limits to absorb excess rainwater and reduce urban flooding.
projects.verbatim_quote: Sponge Parks are proposed to be developed within the limits. An amount of Rs.2.00 crores has been earmarked for this purpose.

projects.name: Groundwater recharge pits in parks (200 under CSR)
projects.description: 200 additional recharge pits to be constructed under CSR during the year (563 already constructed).
projects.verbatim_quote: 563 recharge pits have already been constructed, and during the current year, action will be taken to construct 200 additional recharge pits under CSR initiatives.

projects.name: Park encroachment removal and fencing
projects.description: Remove encroachments in parks and protect them with fencing.
projects.verbatim_quote: Action will be taken to remove encroachments in parks within the limits, and it is proposed to protect and preserve the parks by fencing them.

projects.name: Brand Bengaluru health allocation (BSCC)
projects.description: Rs.31.99 crore earmarked for BSCC under Brand Bengaluru - includes Ejipura maternity hospital and UPHC/Namma Clinic upgrades.
projects.verbatim_quote: Under the Brand Bengaluru initiative, Rs.31.99 crore has been allocated to the Bengaluru South City Corporation.

projects.name: Ejipura 50-bed maternity hospital
projects.description: Construction of a 50-bed maternity hospital in Ejipura area (subset of Brand Bengaluru health allocation).
projects.verbatim_quote: Rs.18.96 crore will be utilized for the construction of a 50-bed maternity hospital in the Ejipura area.

projects.name: 25 UPHCs + 49 Namma Clinic repairs & equipment
projects.description: Repair of buildings and procurement of equipment for 25 Urban Primary Health Centres and 49 Namma Clinics.
projects.verbatim_quote: Rs.13.03 crore will be utilized for the repair of buildings and procurement of equipment for 25 Urban Primary Health Centres and 49 Namma Clinics.

projects.name: Contract OB-GYN & paediatrician at 4 24/7 UPHCs
projects.description: Appoint one obstetrician/gynaecologist and one paediatrician on contract at each of four 24/7 UPHCs conducting normal deliveries.
projects.verbatim_quote: it is proposed to appoint one obstetrician and gynaecologist and one paediatrician on a contract basis at each of these four centres.

projects.name: Hub & Spoke laboratory testing model
projects.description: Hub & Spoke model for blood sample collection from 25 UPHCs + 49 Namma Clinics and testing via empanelled private laboratories.
projects.verbatim_quote: A new "Hub & Spoke" model will be implemented for collecting blood samples from patients visiting the 25 Urban Primary Health Centres and 49 Namma Clinics, and testing will be carried out in empanelled private laboratories.

projects.name: Hotel worker health & hygiene awareness programme
projects.description: Phased awareness programmes on health and hygiene for hotel workers.
projects.verbatim_quote: Awareness programmes on health and hygiene will be organized in a phased manner for workers employed in all hotels.

projects.name: Street vendor food safety awareness programme
projects.description: Phased food safety and hygiene awareness programmes for street food vendors.
projects.verbatim_quote: Awareness programmes on food safety and hygiene will also be conducted in a phased manner for street food vendors.

projects.name: Seasonal disease alerts & public health communication
projects.description: Introduce seasonal disease alert and public health communication systems.
projects.verbatim_quote: Seasonal disease alerts and public health communication systems will be introduced within the jurisdiction of the Bengaluru South City Corporation.

projects.name: Indira Canteen menu diversification
projects.description: Introduce greater variety in Indira Canteen menus and transform them into citizen-friendly canteens.
projects.verbatim_quote: Efforts will be made to introduce greater variety in the food menu and transform them into citizen-friendly canteens in our Indira Canteen.

projects.name: Mosquito control spraying operations
projects.description: Spraying operations for mosquito control within Corporation limits.
projects.verbatim_quote: An amount of Rs.8.50 crore has been earmarked for mosquito control measures, including spraying operations, within the Corporation limits.

projects.name: Zero Waste Wards (with BSWML)
projects.description: Create Zero Waste Wards via mandatory source segregation and decentralised composting, in partnership with Bengaluru Solid Waste Management Limited.
projects.verbatim_quote: With the support of Bengaluru Solid Waste Management Limited, it is proposed to create Zero Waste Wards. Action will be taken to enforce mandatory waste segregation at source.

projects.name: Garbage-free public zones (roads, parks, circles)
projects.description: Private-partnership initiative to transform public places such as roads, parks and major circles into garbage-free zones.
projects.verbatim_quote: steps will be taken to transform public places such as roads, parks, and major circles into garbage-free zones.

projects.name: Waste Transfer Centres at Koramangala & HSR Layout
projects.description: Existing Waste Transfer Centres at Koramangala and HSR Layout (under 'Waste to Wealth' slogan) produce biogas and compost.
projects.verbatim_quote: Waste Transfer Centres have already been established in Koramangala and HSR Layout with public participation under the slogan "Waste to Wealth." These centres are being utilized to produce biogas and compost.

projects.name: One waste-management centre per ward (wet-waste composting)
projects.description: Establish one waste-management centre in each ward to reduce wet waste sent to disposal and convert it into compost/biogas.
projects.verbatim_quote: the Corporation aims to establish one waste management centre in each ward. Through this initiative, the quantity of wet waste being sent to disposal units will be reduced, and wet waste will instead be used to produce compost and biogas.

projects.name: Scientific animal-waste disposal plan
projects.description: Plan for scientific disposal of animal waste within BSCC limits.
projects.verbatim_quote: A plan will be prepared for the scientific disposal of animal waste within the limits.

projects.name: 8 mechanical street-sweeping machines (300 km arterial roads)
projects.description: Deploy 8 mechanical street-sweeping machines (min 5 cum capacity) on rental basis to sweep ~300 km arterial/sub-arterial roads.
projects.verbatim_quote: it is proposed to deploy 8 mechanical street sweeping machines with a minimum capacity of 5Cum on a rental basis.

projects.name: BSWML solid waste management allocation
projects.description: Funds to be provided to Bengaluru Solid Waste Management Limited for SWM collection and disposal.
projects.verbatim_quote: For the year 2026-27, a total amount of Rs.300.00 crores has been earmarked to be provided to Bengaluru Solid Waste Management Limited for solid waste management, collection, and disposal.

projects.name: Quarterly Pourakarmika health check-ups
projects.description: Health check-ups for all sanitation workers every three months.
projects.verbatim_quote: Health check-ups for all Pourakarmikas (sanitation workers) of the Corporation will be conducted once every three months.

projects.name: Pourakarmika safety equipment (gloves, brooms, PPE)
projects.description: Hand gloves, brooms and other protective gear for sanitation workers.
projects.verbatim_quote: Safety equipment such as hand gloves, brooms, and other protective gear will be provided to the sanitation workers... An amount of Rs.5.00 crores has been earmarked for this purpose.

projects.name: 500-dog-capacity shelter (Supreme Court directive)
projects.description: Construction of a dog shelter with 500-dog capacity per Supreme Court directive on stray dog management.
projects.verbatim_quote: action will be taken to construct a dog shelter with a capacity of 500 dogs so as to enhance the capacity of the Corporation to handle the stray dogs.

projects.name: New ABC (dog sterilisation) centre - 50/day capacity
projects.description: Establish one additional ABC centre capable of 50 sterilisation procedures per day (existing centres at Hulimavu and Chamarajpet insufficient).
projects.verbatim_quote: It is therefore proposed to establish one more ABC center which can handle sterilization procedures for 50 stray dogs per day.

projects.name: Cattle pounds for stray cattle control
projects.description: Construct cattle pounds to control stray cattle within Corporation limits.
projects.verbatim_quote: A plan will be formulated to construct cattle pounds to control stray cattle within the Corporation limits.

projects.name: Mobile crematorium for small animal/bird/livestock carcasses
projects.description: Mobile crematorium for scientific disposal of small animal, bird and livestock carcasses found in public places.
projects.verbatim_quote: A mobile crematorium will be introduced for the scientific disposal of carcasses of small animals, birds, and livestock found dead in public places.

projects.name: Welfare Department overall programmes allocation
projects.description: Overall welfare allocation for SC/ST, BC, minorities, persons with disabilities, Pourakarmikas, senior citizens, street vendors, transgender community.
projects.verbatim_quote: An amount of Rs.260.67 crores has been earmarked in the Budget for 2026-27 for these welfare programmes.

projects.name: Individual housing & Amrutha Mahotsava 1BHK subsidy
projects.description: Rs.5 lakh each for individual house construction for Pourakarmikas, SC/ST, BC, manual scavengers and PwD; additional Rs.5 lakh for 1BHK flat purchase under Amrutha Mahotsava scheme.
projects.verbatim_quote: financial assistance of Rs.5.00 lakh each will be provided for the construction of individual houses... a subsidy of Rs.5.00 lakh will be provided for the purchase of 1 BHK flats. An amount of Rs.88.25 crores has been earmarked for this purpose.

projects.name: Higher education support scheme (scholarships, fee reimbursement, overseas)
projects.description: Scholarships, fee reimbursement, first-class cash incentives and overseas education support for Pourakarmikas, SC/ST, BC, PwD and gardeners' children.
projects.verbatim_quote: under the higher education support scheme, scholarships, reimbursement of school/college fees, cash incentives for children of Pourakarmikas who secure first class, and financial assistance for overseas education will be provided.

projects.name: Medical expense reimbursement (Pourakarmikas, SC/ST/BC)
projects.description: Medical-expense reimbursement and support for serious illness treatment for Pourakarmikas, dependents and SC/ST/BC beneficiaries.
projects.verbatim_quote: funds amounting to Rs.12.73 crore have been earmarked towards reimbursement of medical expenses and support for treatment of serious illnesses.

projects.name: Free electric two-wheelers to eligible women & SC/ST Pourakarmikas
projects.description: Free electric two-wheelers to eligible working women and SC/ST Pourakarmikas.
projects.verbatim_quote: Steps will be taken to distribute electric two-wheelers free of cost to eligible working women and Pourakarmikas belonging to SC/ST categories, at an estimated cost of Rs.6.00 crores.

projects.name: Free tricycles for persons with disabilities
projects.description: Free tricycles to eligible beneficiaries to support employment opportunities for persons with disabilities.
projects.verbatim_quote: It is proposed to provide free tricycles to eligible beneficiaries within the Corporation limits with the objective of supporting employment opportunities for persons with disabilities. An amount of Rs.2.96 crores has been earmarked for this purpose.

projects.name: E-Vending vehicles for street vendors
projects.description: Distribute E-Vending vehicles to eligible street vendors to strengthen economic and social status.
projects.verbatim_quote: E-Vending vehicles will be distributed under the scheme with an outlay of Rs.11.92 crore during the year 2026-27.

projects.name: Free laptops for Pourakarmika / SC/ST / BC degree students
projects.description: Free laptops for degree-pursuing students from civic-worker families, SC/ST and Backward Classes.
projects.verbatim_quote: Laptops will be distributed free of cost at an estimated cost of Rs.5.00 crore during the year 2026-27.

projects.name: Skill development training for Pourakarmika children & SC/ST youth
projects.description: Skill development training programmes for self-reliance of Pourakarmika children and eligible SC/ST youth.
projects.verbatim_quote: Skill development training programmes will be organized to empower the children of Pourakarmikas and eligible youth belonging to SC/ST communities to lead self-reliant lives.

projects.name: Self-employment auto & car purchase scheme
projects.description: Financial assistance for auto-rickshaw and car purchase for unemployed dependents of Pourakarmikas, SC/ST and BC.
projects.verbatim_quote: Financial assistance amounting to Rs.12.00 crore will be provided under the self-employment scheme for the purchase of auto-rickshaws and cars during the year 2026-27.

projects.name: Sewing machines for women beneficiaries + training
projects.description: Training for eligible women through Corporation training centres plus sewing machines for women beneficiaries.
projects.verbatim_quote: sewing machines will be distributed to women beneficiaries with an estimated outlay of Rs.2.00 crore during the year 2026-27.

projects.name: Marriage incentive for Pourakarmika / manual scavenger daughters
projects.description: Rs.1 lakh marriage incentive per eligible daughter of Pourakarmikas and manual scavengers.
projects.verbatim_quote: A marriage incentive of Rs.1.00 lakh will be provided to eligible daughters of Pourakarmikas and manual scavengers... An amount of Rs.2.00 crore has been earmarked for this purpose.

budget_totals_for_reference.note: All figures converted from crore to lakh (1 crore = 100 lakh). Source: 'Budget at a Glance' on English page 71.
